---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for an implementation or tooling.
title: "feat: <one-line description>"
labels: enhancement
---

<!--
For SPEC changes (new fields, validation rules, algorithm changes) open a
Discussion in the `spec` board first. See CONTRIBUTING.md "Spec changes —
go through Discussions first".
-->

## What's the problem

<!-- Describe the user problem this would solve. NOT the proposed solution yet. -->

## What's the proposed feature

<!-- Concrete description of what would change. If you have a sketch of the API or wire shape, paste it. -->

## Why now

<!-- What's the trigger? An external dependency dropping support? A new threat model? A request from N integrators? -->

## What's out-of-scope for this feature

<!-- Be explicit about the boundaries so the conversation doesn't drift. -->

## Open questions

<!-- Decisions that the maintainer + community would need to make. -->

## Related work

<!-- Similar features in other projects; relevant RFCs; prior discussions. -->
